behavior_summary: Provides item behavior for a bedroll: a short 'U8P_BEDROLL::look' handler that makes the bedroll produce its short description, and a 'use' handler that implements resting mechanics with guards, a player prompt, time advancement, visual fade transitions, and recovery of HP/mana.
BEDROLL::look (Event 0) simply invokes Item::bark to show the item's short description to the inspecting process.

BEDROLL::use (Event 1) prevents resting while in combat or when enemies are nearby, otherwise asks the player how many rest periods (0–5) to take; if >0 it saves and sets avatar stasis, fades to black, advances in-game time by 4 * periods hours, spawns a background rest process, restores HP/mana (inferred from STR/INT), fades back, and restores previous stasis.
notable_control_flow: U8P_BEDROLL::look: immediate linear flow — set minimal item info/exclusion, call Item::bark with literal "bedroll ", then suspend/return.
U8P_BEDROLL::use: guarded entry — checks Npc::isInCombat OR Npc::areEnemiesNear and barks "This is no time to rest!" if true.
Prompt path — runs FREE::36E7 (pre-prompt housekeeping), barks prompt string, builds string list "0".."5", calls Item::ask and maps returned string to numeric periods.

Rest path — save avatar stasis (getAvatarInStasis), set stasis (setAvatarInStasis(1)), process FadeToBlack(pid), advance time by 4*periods (TimeInGameHours + 4*periods -> SetTimeInGameHours), spawn FREE::1C19(pid, 0x64, 0), restore HP/mana (Npc::getStr -> Npc::setHp(2*STR); Npc::getInt -> Npc::setMana(2*INT) inferred), process FadeFromBlack(pid), restore saved stasis, clean up and return.
open_questions: FREE::36E7 and FREE::1C19 are observed but their exact runtime roles are not explicit — FREE::36E7 appears to be UI or prompt preparation/cleanup and FREE::1C19 appears to spawn a background rest handler/tick, but this is inferred.
Exact HP and Mana restoration formulas are inferred (code multiplies STR and INT by 2) but the precise intended game formula and caps (e.g., max HP/mana) are not explicit.
Precise semantics of setAvatarInStasis (which stasis bit(s) are set/cleared) and interactions with other systems during stasis are unknown and only partially inferred.
The exact units and wrap/overflow behavior of TimeInGameHours/SetTimeInGameHours (e.g., day rollover logic) are not shown here.

main_function.name: U8P_BEDROLL::look
main_function.purpose: When a player/actor inspects the bedroll, emit the bedroll's short description via Item::bark.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the 'U8P_BEDROLL::look' event (Event 0) when an actor examines or enters the item's U8P_BEDROLL::look area.

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::look
function_map.role: Emit the bedroll's short description when inspected (calls Item::bark).

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::use
function_map.role: Implement resting mechanics when the bedroll is used: guard against combat/enemies, prompt for periods, advance time, spawn rest handler, and restore HP/mana.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Display/speak short text associated with an item or process; used by both U8P_BEDROLL::look and use.

function_map.name: Item::ask
function_map.role: Present selectable string choices to the player and return the chosen string (used to ask how many periods to rest).

function_map.name: Npc::isInCombat
function_map.role: Query whether the avatar/NPC is in combat; used to block resting.

function_map.name: Npc::areEnemiesNear
function_map.role: Check for nearby enemies to block resting if true.

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::getAvatarInStasis
function_map.role: Read current avatar stasis state so it can be saved and restored around the rest operation.

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::setAvatarInStasis
function_map.role: Set avatar stasis (freeze/unfreeze avatar); used to set stasis before fade and restore it afterwards.

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::process FadeToBlack
function_map.role: Trigger fade-to-black visual transition prior to time advancement/rest.

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::process FadeFromBlack
function_map.role: Trigger fade-from-black visual transition after rest completes.

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::TimeInGameHours
function_map.role: Read current in-game hour count for computing new time after rest.

function_map.name: U8P_BEDROLL::SetTimeInGameHours
function_map.role: Set/advance in-game time to a new hour value after rest.

function_map.name: FREE::36E7
function_map.role: Observed pre-prompt housekeeping or UI prep call prior to Item::ask (purpose inferred).

function_map.name: FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Spawned process during rest; likely a background rest handler or delayed resume routine (purpose inferred).

function_map.name: Npc::getStr
function_map.role: Read the avatar's Strength attribute for computing HP restoration.

function_map.name: Npc::setHp
function_map.role: Set avatar HP (used to apply healing/restoration after resting).

function_map.name: Npc::getInt
function_map.role: Read the avatar's Intelligence attribute for computing mana restoration.

function_map.name: Npc::setMana
function_map.role: Set avatar mana (used to apply mana restoration after resting).

external_calls.purpose: Emit the short description string "bedroll "; direct player-facing message.
Guard: check if avatar is in combat to block resting.
Guard: check for nearby enemies to block resting.
Inform player when resting is blocked ("This is no time to rest!") and present prompt strings.
Pre-prompt housekeeping / UI preparation before showing choices (inferred).
Present choice list ("0".."5") and obtain selected periods as a string.
Save current avatar stasis state before entering rest sequence.
Set avatar into stasis (freeze) for the rest transition.
Perform fade-to-black visual transition prior to time advancement/rest.
Read current time to compute new hour value after resting (base for +4*periods).
Advance in-game time by adding 4 * chosen periods.
Spawn a background process related to resting (observed spawn with args (pid, 0x64, 0); inferred to manage rest ticks or delayed resume).
Read Strength to compute HP restoration after rest.
Apply healed HP value (inferred as 2 * STR based on code pattern).
Read Intelligence to compute mana restoration after rest.
Apply restored mana value (inferred as 2 * INT based on code pattern).
Perform fade-from-black visual transition after rest completes.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides item behavior for a bedroll: a short 'U8P_BEDROLL::look' handler that makes the bedroll produce its short description, and a 'use' handler that implements resting mechanics with guards, a player prompt, time advancement, visual fade transitions, and recovery of HP/mana.
